title: Your Story, Your Way: Writing an Autobiography

questions.question: What does "tone" mean?
options: the arrangement of events in the order in which they happened.
a very strong feeling of enthusiasm or love for something.
the qualities that make a person unique, like being kind, brave, or funny.
the general attitude or feeling of a piece of writing, like friendly, serious, or excited.
questions.correct_answer: the general attitude or feeling of a piece of writing, like friendly, serious, or excited.
questions.explanation: "tone" means: the general attitude or feeling of a piece of writing, like friendly, serious, or excited.

questions.question: What does "personality" mean?
options: the general attitude or feeling of a piece of writing, like friendly, serious, or excited.
the qualities that make a person unique, like being kind, brave, or funny.
the arrangement of events in the order in which they happened.
a very strong feeling of enthusiasm or love for something.
questions.correct_answer: the qualities that make a person unique, like being kind, brave, or funny.
questions.explanation: "personality" means: the qualities that make a person unique, like being kind, brave, or funny.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: An autobiography is your personal life story, told from your ______ of view, full of your unique tone and personality.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "An autobiography is your personal life story, told from your point of view, full of your unique tone and personality."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Use a timeline to help organize your autobiography into clear, chronological sections.
Autobiographies often contain more personal feelings, thoughts, and vivid details than biographies.
An autobiography is your personal life story, told from your point of view, full of your unique tone and personality.
Starting your autobiography with a passion or an exciting event can make it engaging.
questions.correct_answer: Autobiographies often contain more personal feelings, thoughts, and vivid details than biographies.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Autobiographies often contain more personal feelings, thoughts, and vivid details than biographies." is one of the key things to remember.

questions.question: What does "passion" mean?
options: a very strong feeling of enthusiasm or love for something.
the general attitude or feeling of a piece of writing, like friendly, serious, or excited.
the qualities that make a person unique, like being kind, brave, or funny.
the arrangement of events in the order in which they happened.
questions.correct_answer: a very strong feeling of enthusiasm or love for something.
questions.explanation: "passion" means: a very strong feeling of enthusiasm or love for something.
